1.content:
## SRE Operations Dashboard
Real-time service reliability — active problems, service health, infrastructure metrics, and log errors.

2.title: Open Problems
2.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| filter event.status == "ACTIVE"
| summarize open_problems = count()

3.title: Error Problems
3.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| filter event.status == "ACTIVE" and event.category == "ERROR"
| summarize errors = count()

4.title: Availability Problems
4.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| filter event.status == "ACTIVE" and event.category == "AVAILABILITY"
| summarize availability = count()

5.title: Resource Contention
5.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| filter event.status == "ACTIVE" and event.category == "RESOURCE_CONTENTION"
| summarize resource_contention = count()

6.title: Slowdowns
6.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| filter event.status == "ACTIVE" and event.category == "SLOWDOWN"
| summarize slowdowns = count()

11.title: Log Errors Over Time
11.query:
fetch logs
| filter loglevel == "ERROR"
| makeTimeseries errors = count(), interval: 5m

12.title: Active Problems
12.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| filter event.status == "ACTIVE"
| fields display_id, event.name, event.category, event.start, root_cause_entity_name, affected_entity_names
| sort event.start desc
| limit 50

13.title: Problems by Category
13.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| filter event.status == "ACTIVE"
| summarize problems = count(), by: {event.category}
| sort problems desc
